meta.title: 2026 Hyundai Warranty Coverage Guide
meta.purpose: Structured coverage lookup for front-end coverage search, assistant responses, and claim guidance.
notes: This guide is for coverage lookup and explanation.
Use claimPortalSchema.json for portal field structure.
Use claimRequirements.json for documentation and submission requirements.
Use claimErrorRules.json for return and validation issue handling.

coverage_categories.label: General Warranty Statement
coverage_categories.summary: Hyundai Motor America provides express limited warranties on qualifying new Hyundai vehicles and reimburses dealers for qualifying repairs, replacements, or adjustments within the applicable warranty terms.
applies_to: New Hyundai vehicles distributed by Hyundai Motor America
Dealer reimbursement for qualifying warrantable repairs
core_coverage: Repair, replacement, or adjustment of qualifying defective parts
Coverage under Hyundai limited warranty terms
Dealer reimbursement when the repair meets warranty requirements
claim_notes: Coverage depends on the specific limited warranty and the vehicle being within the applicable warranty period.

coverage_categories.label: Warranty Period and Transferability
coverage_categories.summary: Warranty begins on retail sale, date of first use, or demonstrator/company-car in-service date, whichever occurs first. Most Hyundai warranty coverage transfers to subsequent owners, except the 10-year/100,000-mile Powertrain Limited Warranty.
core_coverage: Unexpired Hyundai warranty coverage transfers to subsequent owners
Most Hyundai Motor America warranty coverage follows the vehicle

limits.notes: Excluded from general transferability treatment described for change of ownership.

transferability: Most Hyundai warranty coverage applies to the vehicle and transfers to later owners.
Original selling dealer must disclose start date if vehicle first went into service as a demonstrator or company car.
not_covered: 10 year/100,000 mile Powertrain Limited Warranty is excluded from the general change-of-ownership transfer rule described in this section.
claim_notes: Warranty start date depends on date of retail sale, first use, or first in-service date.
RDR / DCS data controls first-use recording.

coverage_categories.label: Warranty Jurisdiction
coverage_categories.summary: Warranty applicability depends on vehicle specifications, Hyundai Motor America distribution status, and registration/operation geography.
applies_to: Vehicles built to United States specifications
Vehicles distributed by Hyundai Motor America
Vehicles registered and operated in covered jurisdictions
core_coverage: New Vehicle Limited Warranty for qualifying U.S.-spec vehicles
Powertrain Limited Warranty for qualifying U.S.-spec vehicles
Anti-Perforation Limited Warranty for qualifying U.S.-spec vehicles
Federal Emissions warranties for qualifying vehicles in covered U.S. and territory jurisdictions

limits.notes: Primary jurisdiction for major Hyundai vehicle warranties.

limits.value: Puerto Rico, Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, Northern Mariana Islands
limits.notes: Federal emissions warranty extends to these jurisdictions.

not_covered: Vehicles built to non-U.S. specifications and distributed outside HMA follow the warranty of the applicable country rather than the U.S. Hyundai warranty structure.
Force majeure / Acts of God-type events are excluded from HMA liability for breach of warranty in this section.
claim_notes: For non-standard jurisdiction situations, dealer may need to contact Hyundai Customer Care Center before repair.

coverage_categories.label: New Vehicle Limited Warranty - Basic Covered Repair Rule
coverage_categories.summary: Repair or replacement of Hyundai-manufactured or installed components found defective in material or factory workmanship under normal use and maintenance, subject to warranty terms and exclusions.
applies_to: Components originally manufactured or installed by Hyundai Motor Company, Hyundai Motor Group, HMMA, KMMG, KMM, or HMA
Defects in material or factory workmanship
core_coverage: Repair of defective covered component
Replacement of defective covered component
Towing to nearest Hyundai dealership or authorized service location when vehicle is inoperable due to a warrantable defect
Use of new Hyundai Genuine Parts or Hyundai-authorized remanufactured parts in repairs

limits.notes: Towing expense rule discussed in this section.
Towing expense rule discussed in this section.

not_covered: Items specifically listed under Section 4.1.15 What is Not Covered.
claim_notes: This is the baseline component defect coverage rule.
Always read together with the What is Not Covered section.

coverage_categories.label: What is Not Covered
coverage_categories.summary: Defines Hyundai warranty exclusions, wear items, excluded damage causes, and diagnostic/non-warrantable situations.
applies_to: New Vehicle Limited Warranty exclusion review
core_coverage: Normal maintenance services are covered only when performed as part of a covered warrantable repair.
Some normal maintenance items may be covered when replacement is due to defect in material or factory workmanship.

limits.notes: Applies to certain defect-related maintenance item coverage.

not_covered: Normal maintenance services unless performed as part of a covered warrantable repair
Normal deterioration or wear items
Vehicles with altered odometer mileage
Scrapped vehicles with salvage certificate issued
Damage from negligence of proper maintenance
Damage from misuse, abuse, accident, theft, or fire
Damage from improper or insufficient fuel, fluids, or lubricants
Damage from non-genuine parts or unapproved accessories when causally related
Damage from modifications, tampering, or improper repair
Tires under separate tire manufacturer warranty
Damage from airborne fallout, salt, hail, windstorms, Acts of God
Stone chipping, road debris, paint scratches, dents, similar body damage
Parts or glass broken during removal as part of repair
Diagnostic labor that does not establish a warrantable condition
Incidental or consequential damages
Implied warranties beyond duration of the limited warranty
claim_notes: Coverage is not automatically denied just because a non-Hyundai part exists; denial depends on whether that part, misuse, or improper maintenance caused or contributed to the problem.

coverage_categories.label: Maintenance Item Defect Coverage
coverage_categories.summary: Certain maintenance items may still be covered when replacement is required because of defect in material or factory workmanship rather than normal wear.
core_coverage: Replacement of specified maintenance items when failure is due to defect in material or factory workmanship
Wheel alignment and tire rotation when performed as part of a covered warrantable repair

limits.notes: From date of original retail delivery or first use.

not_covered: Normal wear and consumable replacement not caused by defect
claim_notes: This is an exception inside the larger exclusions section.

coverage_categories.label: Transportation Reimbursement Boundary
coverage_categories.summary: SRC, 3rd Party Rental, and Rideshare reimbursement programs may support qualifying repairs but are not themselves part of the New Vehicle Limited Warranty.
core_coverage: Transportation reimbursement for qualifying repair situations under Hyundai policy rules

limits.value: Not considered part of the New Vehicle Limited Warranty

not_covered: Transportation options are not part of NVLW itself
claim_notes: Use claim and rental workflow logic, not pure coverage logic, when processing these items.

coverage_categories.label: HSA Goodwill Self-Authorization Extension
coverage_categories.summary: Hyundai Dealer Self-Authorization (HSA) allows qualifying enrolled dealers to self-authorize certain out-of-warranty and selected warranty-related goodwill repairs within specified limits.
core_coverage: Selected goodwill repairs processed directly upon claim submission when within HSA limits
Extended repair handling for certain warranty families beyond normal base terms

limits.notes: Total repair amount per visit for self-authorized goodwill.

limits.value: Engine and transmission assemblies require prior approval
limits.notes: Cannot be self-authorized under normal HSA handling.

not_covered: Engine and transmission assembly replacement without prior approval
Wear-related part replacement not eligible for HSA
Equus maintenance repairs not performed as scheduled maintenance under applicable Equus guidance
claim_notes: This is not basic warranty coverage. It is a controlled self-authorization/goodwill extension process.

coverage_categories.label: Parts and Accessories HSA Example Window
coverage_categories.summary: One HSA example includes Parts and Accessories Warranty repairs beyond normal term but within an extended self-authorized goodwill window.
applies_to: Parts and Accessories Warranty goodwill example handling under HSA
core_coverage: Parts and Accessories Warranty repairs beyond 12 months/12,000 miles but within the specified HSA extension window

limits.notes: HSA example upper limit from original customer purchase.
HSA example upper limit from original customer purchase.

claim_notes: This is a goodwill/HSA example window, not the baseline warranty statement itself.

coverage_categories.label: Ownership and Original Owner Validation
coverage_categories.summary: Some warranty handling depends on ownership status and original-owner validation documentation.
core_coverage: Most Hyundai warranty coverage follows the vehicle
Original-owner-sensitive handling may require extra validation

limits.value: Original Owner Verification Affidavit and supporting registration may be required
limits.notes: Used in original owner validation workflows.

transferability: Most coverage transfers with the vehicle, except where excluded by specific warranty program rules.
claim_notes: Use this category with claimRequirements.json when ownership validation affects claim support.
